meta.title: SEEMOTO KUIVURIVAHTI — AI-Powered Grain Dryer Monitoring
meta.description: The only grain dryer monitor with AI. Fire warning 10–15 min in advance. Exhaust temperature and humidity. 4G + battery. Install in under 30 min. Made in Finland.

hero.tagline: The only dryer guardian that never sleeps.
hero.subTagline: AI-powered grain dryer monitoring. Fire warning 10–15 min in advance. Install in under 30 minutes.

problem.headline: 3,000 dryers without remote monitoring. Every autumn.
problem.card1Text: During harvest season, farmers wake up at 2–4 AM to check the dryer. 4–6 weeks every autumn. Over 200 hours of lost sleep.
problem.card2Text: 60–80 grain dryer fires per year in Finland. Average damage €50,000–500,000. Main cause: unmonitored overheating.
problem.card3Text: One percentage point too dry = €300–500 loss per batch. Farmers over-dry for safety — wasting energy and grain.

temp.title: Temperature + humidity
temp.text: The only device that measures both. Temperature tells what's happening — humidity tells when the grain is dry.

ai.title: AI-powered fire warning
ai.text: Detects abnormal temperature rise rates 10–15 min before critical situations.

alert.title: Alert three ways
alert.text: Push notification, SMS and voice call. Wakes you even when your phone is on silent.

weather.title: Weather-aware drying planning
weather.text: 72h drying window forecast. Frost forecast. Lightning storm alert. NordPool electricity price.

fourG.title: 4G + 8h battery
fourG.text: Works without home network. Works during power outages. Covers all of Finland.

install.title: Install in under 30 min
install.text: No electrician needed. Attach sensor to exhaust duct — done.

brand.title: Works with all brands
brand.text: Antti, Mepu, Opico — brand doesn't matter. If it has an exhaust duct, SEEMOTO KUIVURIVAHTI fits.

weather.headline: What's the best drying time today at your farm?
weather.lightningClear: No thunderstorms in your area for the next 48h

testimonial.title: Veijo Huju's dryer. August 2025. 6,478 measurements.
testimonial.quote: For the first time in 15 years, I slept through the night during harvest season. When the alert came at 3:47 AM, I shut down the dryer from my phone. Didn't need to get out of bed.
testimonial.name: Veijo Huju

pricing.headline: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.subsidy: Finnish Food Authority investment support: up to 40% of hardware cost. We help with the application.
pricing.leasing: Lease €49/mo — includes device, Pro subscription and installation support.

items.title: Fire warning
items.text: Temperature anomaly detection 10–15 min in advance

items.title: Dryness prediction
items.text: Predicting exact drying time from exhaust humidity

items.title: Energy optimization
items.text: Automatic drying parameter adjustment based on electricity price
